productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Grey Top
description: Composition Grey sleeveless round neck top made of 100% cotton, has a keyhole with a button closure at the neck, short ruffles starting from below the neckline up to the hem and a curved hemline Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations This grey top from united colors of benetton is all about feminine grace coupled with a fun look. If you want to look chic, don this super soft top with multi-layered ruffles. Pair it with jeans or capris for a drop-dead-gorgeous ensemble! Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5.8” and chest 33"
